changes: Added login system with different access levels: viewer, user and admin
App now uses players defined in the database instead of hard-coded names
Full database security policies implemented
Added new Games History section with game details and winner selection
Added new game count stats in Games History section
New aggressive weight system strongly favoring less played heroes without eliminating the others
Added new build info panel in admin section
Move to Supabase
Added ability to hide players from hero stats and sort section
Re-added edit button for heroes
Minor hero panel tweaks
Added option to change sort for dropdown heroes
Code/comments refactoring
Fix bug in hero database view displaying wins instead of plays
Fixed complexity dice image not updating on dropdown change
Changed player header in sort section and hero stats to common look
Modified hero database view
Code cleanup
Added 2 invitee interface changes
Added complexity dice to roll section
Modified change log display
Code cleanup
Fixed 'ALL' dice toggle
Updated to new weight system
Picked heroes drop to weight 20, all others gain 10, no ceiling
Added new search bar
Moved form to add hero to admin section
Other minor tweaks to sort section and search bar
Added button to sort by dates
Updated sort section entirely
Original version
